name: Tempting Trifle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Process soft coconut macaroons into crumbs.
- Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
- Press crumbs evenly onto bottom of greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 15 minutes.
- In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition. Mix in sour cream, whipping cream, sherry, and vanilla. Pour over crust.
- Bake at 325 degrees F. for 1 hour and 10 minutes. Remove from pan and let cool before serving. Chill completely.
- Warm raspberry preserves in saucepan over low heat until melted. Strain to remove seeds. Spread over cheesecake, reaching the edges. Top with dollops of whipped cream and toasted almonds.
